revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing from wikipedia
Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Remove arbitrary coloring to make the content readable in dark mode.
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
